items.title: Cape Verde took advantage of a 48-team World Cup
items.summary: The big nations win the World Cup, but the small nations make it. Cape Verde's progress to the knockouts was for everyone.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Brook: Test captaincy would be 'great honour', as focus turns to India T20I
items.summary: White-ball captain was given "100%" backing by Ben Stokes to take over the red-ball role
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
